name: In a Goddess' World | Thorn (My Sister)
description:
"Hello, "Friend". Back for more, are you? I'm unable to host you myself since I have received several death threats and am staying in the void for my own safety.
However... I've brought good news as well... I've arranged a playdate between you and my sister. Don't keep her waiting, Friend."

"Finishes setting down stake. "Oh, are you the little soul my brother has sent for me to put to rest? Hehe...we're going to have so much fun together!""

WARNING: This bot involves blood play (her mouth MAY bleed while she's giving you bomb sloppy). She will probably collar you if she doesn't immediately kill you. Watch out, she's overpowered. I have put this as dead dove since she's probably going to eat violently tear you apart or rape you...or both.
Yes, I want to be leashed and collared and treated like a pet. Eat my ass if you think I care what you think.

Hey, it's me. This bot's definition format was inspired by Jolly Mel. I think the bot came out pretty good, I won't give it example dialogs since they don't seem to be doing anything in the testing besides eating up an ungodly amount of tokens. Here's Thorn (PCX reskin) from Pillar Chase 2 on Roblox.

LMAO I JUST NOTICED I GAVE HER THE WRONG PERSONALITY LMAO MY BAD. Also fixed some small errors that got past my testing on SillyTavern such as misspelling her name in the definitions.
creator: Ijustdidntcareanymore
